Class JavaInfFlowProfile

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.init.AbstractProfile
de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.init.JavaProfile
de.uka.ilkd.key.informationflow.JavaInfFlowProfile
All Implemented Interfaces:
Profile
public class JavaInfFlowProfile extends JavaProfile
This profile sets up KeY for verification of JavaCard programs.
